title: Coordinate HUD : DemirİnfoHud
body:
DemirInfo HUD

A lightweight, customizable HUD mod that displays useful information directly on your screen.

Features:

    📍 XYZ coordinates & chunk position
    🧭 Compass with cardinal directions and degrees
    🌍 Biome, dimension, weather & game time
    ⚡ FPS, movement speed (m/s)
    💡 Sky & block light levels
    🟢 Slime chunk detection
    ❤️ Health, hunger & armor display
    🎯 Target block info
    🎨 4 themes: Default, Dark, Rainbow, Minimal
    📐 4 corner positions & adjustable scale (0.5x–2.0x)

Keybinds:

    C — Toggle HUD
    G — Toggle compass
    H — Open config

Requirements:

    Minecraft 1.21.11
    Fabric Loader
    Fabric API
